---
title: "local_imp_functions"
author: "Kelvyn Bladen"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document:
    toc: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(fastDummies)
library(caret)
library(rpart)
library(tidyverse)
library(GGally)
library(randomForest)
library(treeshap)
library(lime)
library(patchwork)
library(tictoc)
library(doParallel)
library(future)
library(future.apply)
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
tuneGrid = NULL
local_perm_imp_cm <- function(formula = medv ~ ., data = Boston, 
                              method = "ranger", tuneGrid = tuneGrid, 
                              nsim = 25, folds = 5) {
  model_frame <- model.frame(formula, data = data)
  x <- model_frame[, -1]
  y <- model_frame[, 1]
  nc <- ncol(x)
  nr <- nrow(x)
  
  if (is(y, "factor")) {
    y = factor(y, labels = make.names(levels(y)))
  }
  
  set.seed(123)
  flds <- createFolds(y, k = folds, returnTrain = T)
  set.seed(123)
  flds0 <- createFolds(y, k = folds, list = F, returnTrain = F)
  
  model <- train(x, y, 
                 # formula, data = data,
                 method = method,
                 tuneGrid = tuneGrid,
                 trControl = trainControl(method = "cv",
                                          index = flds,
                                          savePredictions = "final",
                                          classProbs = T))
  
  mods = list()
  for(i in 1:folds){
    mods[[i]] <- train(x[flds0 != i,], y[flds0 != i], 
                 # formula, data = data,
                 method = method,
                 tuneGrid = model$finalModel$tuneValue,
                 trControl = trainControl(method = "none", classProbs = T))
  }
  
  
  output = list()
  output$bestTune = model$bestTune
  output$results = model$results
  output$finalModel = model$finalModel

  model$pred = model$pred %>% arrange(rowIndex)

  x_loc <- x
  x_loc[, ] <- 0
  x_temp <- x_loc

  if (!is(y, "factor")) {
    p = model$pred$pred
    truth = model$pred$obs
    m <- (truth - p)^2
  } else {
    truth <- fastDummies::dummy_cols(as.data.frame(y))[, -1]
    p = model$pred %>% dplyr::select(levels(y))
    m <- rowMeans((truth - p)^2)
  }

  for (j in seq_len(nsim)) {
    for (i in seq_len(nc)) {
      x_new <- x
      x_new[, i] <- x[sample(1:nr), i]

      if (!is(y, "factor")) {
        pr <- truth
        for(k in 1:folds){
          pr[flds0 == k] = predict(mods[[k]], x_new[flds0 == k,], type = "raw")
        }
        new_m <- (truth - pr)^2
      } else {
        pr <- truth
        for(k in 1:folds){
          pr[flds0 == k,] = predict(mods[[k]], x_new[flds0 == k,], 
                                    type = "prob")
        }
        new_m <- rowMeans((truth - pr)^2)
      }
      x_temp[, i] <- new_m - m
    }
    x_loc <- x_loc + x_temp / nsim
  }
  output$local_imp = x_loc
  return(output)
}
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
tuneGrid = NULL
local_grid_imp_cm <- function(formula = medv ~ ., data = Boston, 
                              method = "rf", tuneGrid = tuneGrid, 
                              nsim = 25, folds = 5, quantile_grid = TRUE) {
  model_frame <- model.frame(formula, data = data)
  x <- model_frame[, -1]
  y <- model_frame[, 1]
  nc <- ncol(x)
  
  if (is(y, "factor")) {
    y = factor(y, labels = make.names(levels(y)))
  }
  
  set.seed(123)
  flds <- createFolds(y, k = folds, returnTrain = T)
  set.seed(123)
  flds0 <- createFolds(y, k = folds, list = F, returnTrain = F)
  
  model <- train(x, y, 
                 # formula, data = data,
                 method = method,
                 tuneGrid = tuneGrid,
                 trControl = trainControl(method = "cv",
                                          index = flds,
                                          savePredictions = "final",
                                          classProbs = T))
  
  mods = vector("list", 5)
  for(k in 1:folds){
    mods[[k]] <- train(x[flds0 != k,], y[flds0 != k],
                 # formula, data = data,
                 method = method,
                 tuneGrid = model$finalModel$tuneValue,
                 trControl = trainControl(method = "none", classProbs = T))
  }
  
  output = list()
  output$bestTune = model$bestTune
  output$results = model$results
  output$finalModel = model$finalModel

  model$pred = model$pred %>% arrange(rowIndex)

  x_loc <- x
  x_loc[, ] <- 0

  if (!is(y, "factor")) {
    truth = model$pred$obs
    p = model$pred$pred
    m <- (truth - p)^2
  } else {
    truth <- fastDummies::dummy_cols(as.data.frame(y))[, -1]
    p = model$pred %>% dplyr::select(levels(y))
    m <- rowMeans((truth - p)^2)
  }
  
  for (i in seq_len(nc)) {
    #if(!inherits(x[,i], "numeric")){
    if(!is.numeric(x[,i])){  
      # perhaps do a permutation for factors!
      # maybe convert factors to characters!
      grid_v = round(nsim * table(y) / length(y))
      gd = min(pracma::gcd(grid_v[1], grid_v))
      grid_vals = (grid_v / gd) |> as.data.frame() |> uncount(Freq) |> pull(1)
      
      #grid_vals = unique(x[,i])
    } else {
      grid_vals = ifelse(rep(quantile_grid, nsim),
      quantile(x[,i], probs = seq(0, 1, length = nsim)), #quantile
      seq(min(x[,i]), max(x[,i]), length = nsim)) #uniform
    }
    
    for (j in grid_vals) {
      x_new <- x
      x_new[, i] <- j

      pr <- as.data.frame(truth)
      
      typ = ifelse(!is(y, "factor"), "raw", "prob")
      
      for(k in 1:folds){
        pr[flds0 == k,] = predict(mods[[k]], x_new[flds0 == k,], type = typ)
      }
      
      new_m <- rowMeans((truth - pr)^2)
      
      x_loc[, i] <- x_loc[, i] + ((new_m - m) / length(grid_vals))
    }
    
  }
  output$local_imp = x_loc
  return(output)
}
```

```{r}
library(furrr)
library(doParallel)
library(microbenchmark)

# Example task
task <- function(i) {
  Sys.sleep(0.01)  # Simulate a time-consuming task
  i^2
}

# Using furrr
plan(multisession, workers = 4)
future_time <- microbenchmark(
  furrr = future_map(1:100, task),
  times = 5
)

plan(multisession, workers = 4)
tic()
furr1 = future_map_dfc(1:3, task)
toc()
furr1

tic()
for(i in 1:36){
  x_loc[, i] = task(i)
}
toc()

library(future.apply)
?future_sapply()
tic()
xl = future_sapply(1:36, function(x) task(x))
toc()
xl

# Using foreach
tic()
cl <- makeCluster(4)
registerDoParallel(cl)
# foreach_time <- microbenchmark(
#   foreach = foreach(i = 1:100, .combine = c) %dopar% task(i),
#   times = 5
# )
foreach1 = foreach(i = 1:3, .combine = cbind) %dopar% task(i)
stopCluster(cl)
toc()


?foreach()
print(future_time)
print(foreach_time)

```


```{r, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
unregister_dopar <- function() {
  env <- foreach:::.foreachGlobals
  rm(list=ls(name=env), pos=env)
}
unregister_dopar()

task <- function(i, x, truth, nsim, mods, flds0, m) {
  xi = x[,i]
    if(!is.numeric(xi)){
      grid_v = round(nsim * table(xi) / length(xi))
      gd = min(pracma::gcd(grid_v[1], grid_v))
      grid_vals = (grid_v / gd) |> as.data.frame() |> uncount(Freq) |> pull(1)
      #grid_vals = unique(xi)
    } else {
      grid_vals = ifelse(rep(quantile_grid, nsim),
      quantile(xi, probs = seq(0, 1, length = nsim)), #quantile
      seq(min(xi), max(xi), length = nsim)) #uniform
    }
    
  # descrepencies between prior CLIQUE and this may 
  # lie in using length(grid_vals) instead of nsim
    truth_rep <- do.call(rbind, replicate(length(grid_vals), 
                                          truth, simplify = FALSE))
    pr = truth_rep
    grid_vals_vec <- rep(grid_vals, each = nrow(x))
    x_new_rep <- do.call(rbind, replicate(length(grid_vals), 
                                          x, simplify = FALSE))
    x_new_rep[, i] <- grid_vals_vec
    flds1 = rep(flds0, times = length(grid_vals))
    
    for(k in 1:folds){
      pr[flds1 == k,] = predict(mods[[k]], x_new_rep[flds1 == k,], type = typ)
    }    
      
    new_m <- rowMeans((truth_rep - pr)^2)
    new_m_vec = matrix(new_m, ncol = length(grid_vals)) %>% rowMeans()
    new_m_vec - m
}
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
tuneGrid = NULL
local_grid_imp_cm2 <- function(formula = medv ~ ., data = Boston, 
                              method = "rf", tuneGrid = tuneGrid, 
                              parallel = T, cores = 5,
                              nsim = 25, folds = 5, quantile_grid = TRUE) {
  model_frame <- model.frame(formula, data = data)
  x <- model_frame[, -1]
  y <- model_frame[, 1]
  nc <- ncol(x)
  
  x_loc <- x
  x_loc[, ] <- 0
  
  if (is(y, "factor")) {
    y = factor(y, labels = make.names(levels(y)))
  }
  
  set.seed(123)
  flds <- createFolds(y, k = folds, returnTrain = T)
  set.seed(123)
  flds0 <- createFolds(y, k = folds, list = F, returnTrain = F)
  
  #tic()
  if(parallel){
    cl <- makeCluster(cores)
    doParallel::registerDoParallel(cl)
  } 
  
  model <- train(x, y, 
                   # formula, data = data,
                 method = method,
                 tuneGrid = tuneGrid,
                 trControl = trainControl(method = "cv",
                                          index = flds,
                                          savePredictions = "final",
                                          classProbs = T))
  
  mods = vector("list", 5)
  for(k in 1:folds){
    mods[[k]] <- train(x[flds0 != k,], y[flds0 != k],
                 # formula, data = data,
                 method = method,
                 tuneGrid = model$finalModel$tuneValue,
                 trControl = trainControl(method = "none", classProbs = T))
  }

  if(parallel){
    stopCluster(cl)
    unregister_dopar()
  }
  #toc()

  model$pred = model$pred %>% arrange(rowIndex)

  if (!is(y, "factor")) {
    truth = model$pred$obs
    p = model$pred$pred
    m <- (truth - p)^2
  } else {
    truth <- fastDummies::dummy_cols(as.data.frame(y))[, -1]
    p = model$pred %>% dplyr::select(levels(y))
    m <- rowMeans((truth - p)^2)
  }
  
  typ = ifelse(!is(y, "factor"), "raw", "prob")
  pr <- as.data.frame(truth)
  
  x_loc = future_sapply(seq_len(nc), 
                        function(i) task(i, x = x, truth = truth,
                                         nsim = nsim, mods = mods, 
                                         flds0 = flds0, m = m)) %>% 
    as.data.frame()
  colnames(x_loc) = colnames(x)
  
  # for (i in seq_len(nc)) {
  #   xi = x[,i]
  #   if(!is.numeric(xi)){
  #     grid_v = round(nsim * table(xi) / length(xi))
  #     gd = min(pracma::gcd(grid_v[1], grid_v))
  #     grid_vals = (grid_v / gd) |> as.data.frame() |> uncount(Freq) |> pull(1)
  #     #grid_vals = unique(xi)
  #   } else {
  #     grid_vals = ifelse(rep(quantile_grid, nsim),
  #     quantile(xi, probs = seq(0, 1, length = nsim)), #quantile
  #     seq(min(xi), max(xi), length = nsim)) #uniform
  #   }
  #   
  #   truth_rep <- do.call(rbind, replicate(length(grid_vals), 
  #                                         truth, simplify = FALSE))
  #   pr = truth_rep
  #   grid_vals_vec <- rep(grid_vals, each = nrow(x))
  #   x_new_rep <- do.call(rbind, replicate(length(grid_vals), 
  #                                         x, simplify = FALSE))
  #   x_new_rep[, i] <- grid_vals_vec
  #   flds1 = rep(flds0, times = length(grid_vals))
  #   
  #   x_new_rep
  #   for(k in 1:folds){
  #     pr[flds1 == k,] = predict(mods[[k]], x_new_rep[flds1 == k,], type = typ)
  #   }    
  #     
  #   new_m <- rowMeans((truth_rep - pr)^2)
  #   new_m_vec = matrix(new_m, ncol = length(grid_vals)) %>% rowMeans()
  #   x_loc[, i] <- new_m_vec - m
  #   
  # }
  
  output = list()
  output$bestTune = model$bestTune
  output$results = model$results
  output$finalModel = model$finalModel
  output$local_imp = x_loc
  return(output)
}
```


```{r, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
unregister_dopar <- function() {
  env <- foreach:::.foreachGlobals
  rm(list=ls(name=env), pos=env)
}
unregister_dopar()

task1 <- function(ii, x, truth, nsim, mods, flds0, m, typ, pr) {
  xi = x[,ii]
  if(!is.numeric(xi)){  
    grid_v = round(nsim * table(y) / length(y))
    gd = min(pracma::gcd(grid_v[1], grid_v))
    grid_vals = (grid_v / gd) |> as.data.frame() |> uncount(Freq) |> pull(1)
  } else {
    grid_vals = ifelse(rep(quantile_grid, nsim),
    quantile(xi, probs = seq(0, 1, length = nsim)), #quantile
    seq(min(xi), max(xi), length = nsim)) #uniform
  }
  
  new_m_mat <- sapply(1:length(grid_vals), function(jj){
    x_new <- x
    x_new[, ii] <- grid_vals[jj]

    for(k in 1:folds){
      pr[flds0 == k,] = predict(mods[[k]], x_new[flds0 == k,], type = typ)
    }
    
    rowMeans((truth - pr)^2)
  })
  
  new_m_vec = new_m_mat %>% rowMeans()
  new_m_vec - m
}
```

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
tuneGrid = NULL
local_grid_imp_cm3 <- function(formula = medv ~ ., data = Boston, 
                              method = "rf", tuneGrid = tuneGrid, 
                              parallel = T, cores = 5,
                              nsim = 25, folds = 5, quantile_grid = TRUE) {
  model_frame <- model.frame(formula, data = data)
  x <- model_frame[, -1]
  y <- model_frame[, 1]
  nc <- ncol(x)
  
  # x_loc <- x
  # x_loc[, ] <- 0
  
  if (is(y, "factor")) {
    y = factor(y, labels = make.names(levels(y)))
  }
  
  set.seed(123)
  flds <- createFolds(y, k = folds, returnTrain = T)
  set.seed(123)
  flds0 <- createFolds(y, k = folds, list = F, returnTrain = F)
  
  #tic()
  if(parallel){
    cl <- makeCluster(cores)
    doParallel::registerDoParallel(cl)
  } 
  
  model <- train(x, y, 
                   # formula, data = data,
                 method = method,
                 tuneGrid = tuneGrid,
                 trControl = trainControl(method = "cv",
                                          index = flds,
                                          savePredictions = "final",
                                          classProbs = T))
  
  mods = vector("list", 5)
  for(k in 1:folds){
    mods[[k]] <- train(x[flds0 != k,], y[flds0 != k],
                 # formula, data = data,
                 method = method,
                 tuneGrid = model$finalModel$tuneValue,
                 trControl = trainControl(method = "none", classProbs = T))
  }

  if(parallel){
    stopCluster(cl)
    unregister_dopar()
  }
  #toc()

  model$pred = model$pred %>% arrange(rowIndex)

  if (!is(y, "factor")) {
    truth = model$pred$obs
    p = model$pred$pred
    m <- (truth - p)^2
  } else {
    truth <- fastDummies::dummy_cols(as.data.frame(y))[, -1]
    p = model$pred %>% dplyr::select(levels(y))
    m <- rowMeans((truth - p)^2)
  }
  
  typ = ifelse(!is(y, "factor"), "raw", "prob")
  pr <- as.data.frame(truth)
  
  x_loc = future_sapply(seq_len(nc), 
                        function(ii) task1(ii, x = x, truth = truth,
                                         nsim = nsim, mods = mods, 
                                         flds0 = flds0, m = m,
                                         typ = typ, pr = pr)) %>% 
    as.data.frame()
  colnames(x_loc) = colnames(x)
  
  output = list()
  output$bestTune = model$bestTune
  output$results = model$results
  output$finalModel = model$finalModel
  output$local_imp = x_loc
  return(output)
}
```


```{r}
# Helper function for training models with cross-validation
train_models <- function(x, y, folds, flds0, method, tuneGrid) {
  models <- vector("list", length(folds))
  for (k in seq_len(folds)) {
    models[[k]] <- train(
      x[flds0 != k, ], y[flds0 != k],
      method = method,
      tuneGrid = tuneGrid,
      trControl = trainControl(method = "none", classProbs = TRUE)
    )
  }
  return(models)
}

task2 <- function(ii, x, truth, nsim, mods, flds0, m, typ, 
                  quantile_grid, predictions) {
  # Helper function to generate grid values
  generate_grid_values <- function(xi, nsim, quantile_grid) {
    if (!is.numeric(xi)) {
      grid_v <- round(nsim * table(y) / length(y))
      gd <- min(pracma::gcd(grid_v[1], grid_v))
      grid_vals <- (grid_v / gd) |> as.data.frame() |> uncount(Freq) |> pull(1)
    } else {
      grid_vals <- if (quantile_grid) {
        quantile(xi, probs = seq(0, 1, length = nsim)) # Quantile-based grid
      } else {
        seq(min(xi), max(xi), length = nsim) # Uniform grid
      }
    }
    grid_vals
  }
  
  # Generate grid values for the selected variable
  grid_vals <- generate_grid_values(x[, ii], nsim, quantile_grid)
  
  # Update predictions and calculate errors
  calculate_new_m <- function(grid_val, x, ii, mods, flds0, truth, typ, 
                              predictions) {
    x_new <- x
    x_new[, ii] <- grid_val
    
    for (k in seq_along(mods)) {
      predictions[flds0 == k,] = predict(mods[[k]], x_new[flds0 == k,], 
                                         type = typ)
    }
    
    # Calculate the row-wise mean squared error
    rowMeans((truth - predictions)^2)
  }
  
  # Apply over all grid values
  new_m_mat <- sapply(grid_vals, calculate_new_m, x = x, ii = ii, 
                      mods = mods, flds0 = flds0, truth = truth, typ = typ,
                      predictions = predictions)
  
  # Calculate the mean error for each observation and adjust by baseline errors
  rowMeans(new_m_mat) - m
}

# Main function
local_grid_imp_cm4 <- function(formula = medv ~ ., data = Boston,
                               method = "rf", tuneGrid = tuneGrid,
                               parallel = TRUE, cores = 5, seed = 123,
                               nsim = 25, folds = 5, quantile_grid = TRUE) {
  # Set up the data
  model_frame <- model.frame(formula, data = data)
  x <- model_frame[, -1]
  y <- model_frame[, 1]
  if (is.factor(y)) {
    y <- factor(y, labels = make.names(levels(y)))
  }
  
  # Set up cross-validation folds
  set.seed(seed)
  flds <- createFolds(y, k = folds, returnTrain = TRUE)
  set.seed(seed)
  flds0 <- createFolds(y, k = folds, list = FALSE, returnTrain = FALSE)
  
  # Train the global model
  global_model <- caret::train(
    x, y,
    method = method,
    tuneGrid = tuneGrid,
    trControl = trainControl(
      method = "cv",
      index = flds,
      savePredictions = "final",
      classProbs = TRUE
    )
  )
  
  # Train models for each fold
  mods <- train_models(x, y, folds, flds0, method, 
                       global_model$finalModel$tuneValue)
  
  # Parallel setup
  if (parallel) {
    cl <- makeCluster(cores)
    doParallel::registerDoParallel(cl)
    on.exit({
      stopCluster(cl)
      unregister_dopar()
    })
  }
  
  global_model$pred = global_model$pred %>% arrange(rowIndex)
  
  # Calculate errors
  if (!is.factor(y)) {
    truth <- global_model$pred$obs
    predictions <- global_model$pred$pred
    m <- (truth - predictions)^2
  } else {
    truth <- fastDummies::dummy_cols(as.data.frame(y))[, -1]
    predictions <- global_model$pred %>% dplyr::select(levels(y))
    m <- rowMeans((truth - predictions)^2)
  }
  
  # Task function for parallel computation
  x_loc <- future_lapply(
    seq_len(ncol(x)),
    function(ii) {
      task2(ii, x = x, truth = truth, nsim = nsim, mods = mods,
            flds0 = flds0, m = m, typ = ifelse(!is.factor(y), "raw", "prob"),
            quantile_grid = quantile_grid, predictions = predictions)
    }
  ) %>% as.data.frame()
  colnames(x_loc) <- colnames(x)
  
  # Output
  list(
    bestTune = global_model$bestTune,
    results = global_model$results,
    finalModel = global_model$finalModel,
    local_imp = x_loc
  )
}
```


```{r, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(future.apply)

# Define a computationally intensive task
heavy_computation <- function(x) {
  result <- 0
  for (i in 1:1e6) {
    result <- result + sum((matrix(runif(100), 10, 10) %*% matrix(runif(100), 10, 10)))
  }
  return(result)
}

# Input data
input <- 1:8  # Tasks to be processed

# Sequential lapply (single-threaded)
system.time({
  sequential_results <- lapply(input, heavy_computation)
})

# Parallel future_lapply
plan(multisession, workers = 4)  # Use 4 cores
system.time({
  parallel_results <- future_lapply(input, heavy_computation)
})

```


```{r, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
library(future.apply)

?future.apply::future_lapply()
?plan()
plan("future::multisession", workers = 4)

system.time({
  res <- future_lapply(1:10, function(x) {
    Sys.sleep(0.1)  # Simulate computation
    x^2
  })
})

plan(sequential)

system.time({
  res <- lapply(1:10, function(x) {
    Sys.sleep(0.1)  # Simulate computation
    x^2
  })
})


cl <- makeCluster(5)

# Export required objects to the cluster
clusterExport(cl, varlist = c("x", "flds0", "mods", "y", "m", "nsim", "yd", "folds", "i"))

# Parallelized grid search
x_loc[, i] <- rowSums(parLapply(cl, grid_vals, function(j) {
  x_new <- x
  x_new[, i] <- j

  if (!is(y, "factor")) {
    pr <- numeric(length(yd))
    pr <- unlist(lapply(1:folds, function(k) {
      predict(mods[[k]], x_new[flds0 == k, ], type = "raw")
    }))
    new_m <- (pr - yd)^2
  } else {
    pr <- matrix(0, nrow = nrow(yd), ncol = ncol(yd))
    pr <- do.call(rbind, lapply(1:folds, function(k) {
      predict(mods[[k]], x_new[flds0 == k, ], type = "prob")
    }))
    new_m <- rowMeans((yd - pr)^2)
  }

  ((new_m - m) / nsim)
}))

# Stop the cluster
stopCluster(cl)
```

\newpage
# Data

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
mnist <- arrow::read_parquet("inst/extdata/mnist38.parquet")

mnist1 = mnist[sample(1:nrow(mnist), 200),]
```

# Training Local Importance

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
set.seed(421)

tic()
rt = caret::train(mnist1[,-65], factor(mnist1$y), method = "rf")
# Shap #
rf_unified <- treeshap::randomForest.unify(rt$finalModel, mnist1)
rf_res <- treeshap::treeshap(rf_unified, mnist1)
shap = as.data.frame(rf_res$shaps)
toc()
dim(shap)

# LIME #
library(lime)
tic()
rt = caret::train(mnist1[,-65], factor(mnist1$y), method = "rf")
explanation <- lime(mnist1[,-65], rt, bin_continuous = T, n_bins = 20, use_density = T)
elim = explain(mnist1[,-65], explanation, n_features = 64, labels = "8")
lime = elim %>% dplyr::select(case, feature, feature_weight) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = feature, values_from = c(feature_weight)) %>%
  dplyr::select(-case) %>% as.data.frame()
toc()


tic()
xg = local_grid_imp_cm(formula = factor(y) ~ ., data = mnist1, 
                       method = "rf", tuneGrid = NULL, nsim = 25,
                       folds = 5, quantile_grid = TRUE)
toc()
```

\newpage
# CV Training

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
d1 = data.frame(v1 = mnist1[,1],
                CLIQUE = xg$local_imp$V1,
                SHAP = shap$V1, LIME = lime$V1)

ggpairs(d1, mapping = aes(color = factor(mnist1$y)))

ggpairs(d1)

gq = ggplot(d1, aes(x = v1, y = CLIQUE, color = v2)) +
  geom_point() + ylim(-0.5, 1)
gp = ggplot(d1, aes(x = v1, y = CLIP, color = v2)) +
  geom_point() + ylim(-0.5, 1)
gs = ggplot(d1, aes(x = v1, y = SHAP, color = v2)) +
  geom_point() + ylim(-0.65, 0.65)
gl = ggplot(d1, aes(x = v1, y = LIME, color = v2)) +
  geom_point() + ylim(-0.65, 0.65)

#library(patchwork)

gl + gs + gp + gq + 
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", axis_titles = "collect") &
  ggeasy::easy_add_legend_title("v2")

#ggsave("xor2patch.pdf", dpi = 1600, width = 6.3, height = 4.5)

# ggpairs(d1, mapping = aes(color = 1:404 < 401))

# d2 = data.frame(v = dfc[,2], perm = xl$local_imp$v2,
#                 grid = xg$local_imp$v2,
#                 shap = shap$v2, lime = lime$v2)
# ggpairs(d2, mapping = aes(color = dfc$y))
# ggpairs(d2, mapping = aes(color = 1:404 < 401))

d3 = data.frame(v = dfc[,3], #perm = xl$local_imp$v3,
                grid = xg$local_imp$v3,
                shap = shap$v3, lime = lime$v3)

# ggpairs(d3, mapping = aes(color = 1:404 < 401))
```





# Sim N & P Big Monte Carlo

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
reps = 20

stb2b = mat.or.vec(reps, 4*4)
ltb2b = mat.or.vec(reps, 4)
itb2b = mat.or.vec(reps, 4)
qtb2b = mat.or.vec(reps, 4*4)

for(mm in 1:reps){
  set.seed(mm)
  s1 = Sys.time()
  k = 1
  for(i in c(500, 1000, 2000, 4000)){
    for(j in c(2, 10, 20, 30)){
      s2 = Sys.time()
      mt = ifelse(j == 1, 1, j/2)
      
      temp_df = mnist[sample(1:nrow(mnist), i),
                      c(sample(1:36, j), 37)]

      cl <- makeCluster(5)
      doParallel::registerDoParallel(cl)
      s = Sys.time()
      rt = caret::train(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], 
                        factor(temp_df$y), 
                        method = "rf", tuneGrid = expand.grid(mtry = mt))
      m_time = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs")
      stopCluster(cl)
      unregister_dopar()
    
      s = Sys.time()
      rf_unified <- treeshap::randomForest.unify(rt$finalModel, temp_df)
      rf_res <- treeshap::treeshap(rf_unified, temp_df)
      shap = as.data.frame(rf_res$shaps)
      stb2b[mm, k] = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs") + m_time
    
      if(i == 500){
      s = Sys.time()
      explanation <- lime(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], rt, bin_continuous = T,
                          n_bins = 10, use_density = T)
      elim = explain(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], explanation,
                     n_features = ncol(temp_df)-1, labels = "8")
      lime = elim %>% dplyr::select(case, feature, feature_weight) %>%
        pivot_wider(names_from = feature, values_from = c(feature_weight)) %>%
        dplyr::select(-case) %>% as.data.frame()
      ltb2b[mm, k] = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs") + m_time
      
      s = Sys.time()
      task = mlr::makeClassifTask(data = temp_df, target = "y")
      learner <- mlr::makeLearner("classif.randomForest")
      model <- mlr::train(learner, task)
      
      ici <- featureImportance::featureImportance(model, 
                               data = temp_df, target = "y", 
                               n.feat.perm = 25,
                               local = TRUE)
      iii = ici$importance |>
        pivot_wider(id_cols = c(replace.id, n.feat.perm), names_from = features,
                    values_from = mmce) |>
        group_by(replace.id) |>
        summarize(across(-n.feat.perm, mean, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
        dplyr::select(!replace.id)
      itb2b[mm, k] = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs") + m_time
      }
      
      s = Sys.time()
      xg4 = local_grid_imp_cm4(formula = factor(y) ~ .,
                             data = temp_df,
                             parallel = T, cores = 5, seed = k,
                             method = "rf", tuneGrid = expand.grid(mtry = mt), 
                             nsim = 25, folds = 5, quantile_grid = T)
      qtb2b[mm, k] = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs")
      
      print(k)
      print(as.numeric(Sys.time() - s2, units = "mins"))
      k = k + 1
    }
  }
  
  write.csv(stb2b, "shap_time3.csv", row.names = F)
  write.csv(ltb2b, "lime_time3.csv", row.names = F)
  write.csv(itb2b, "ici_time3.csv", row.names = F)
  write.csv(qtb2b, "clique_time3.csv", row.names = F)
  
  print(mm)
  print(as.numeric(Sys.time() - s1, units = "mins"))
}
```

# Sim 1000 LIME Monte Carlo

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
reps = 20

ll1 = mat.or.vec(reps, 4)
ii1 = mat.or.vec(reps, 4)
ll1 = read.csv("lime_time_1ka.csv")
ii1 = read.csv("ici_time_1ka.csv")

for(mm in 20:reps){
  set.seed(mm)
  s1 = Sys.time()
  k = 1
  for(j in c(2, 10, 20, 30)){
    s2 = Sys.time()
    mt = ifelse(j == 1, 1, j/2)
    
    temp_df = mnist[sample(1:nrow(mnist), 1000),
                      c(sample(1:36, j), 37)]

    cl <- makeCluster(5)
    doParallel::registerDoParallel(cl)
    s = Sys.time()
    rt = caret::train(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], 
                      factor(temp_df$y), 
                      method = "rf", tuneGrid = expand.grid(mtry = mt))
    m_time = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs")
    stopCluster(cl)
    unregister_dopar()
  
    s = Sys.time()
    explanation <- lime(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], rt, bin_continuous = T,
                        n_bins = 10, use_density = T)
    elim = explain(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], explanation,
                   n_features = ncol(temp_df)-1, labels = "8")
    lime = elim %>% dplyr::select(case, feature, feature_weight) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = feature, values_from = c(feature_weight)) %>%
      dplyr::select(-case) %>% as.data.frame()
    ll1[mm, k] = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs") + m_time
    
    s = Sys.time()
    task = mlr::makeClassifTask(data = temp_df, target = "y")
    learner <- mlr::makeLearner("classif.randomForest")
    model <- mlr::train(learner, task)
    
    ici <- featureImportance::featureImportance(model, 
                             data = temp_df, target = "y", 
                             n.feat.perm = 25,
                             local = TRUE)
    iii = ici$importance |>
      pivot_wider(id_cols = c(replace.id, n.feat.perm), names_from = features,
                  values_from = mmce) |>
      group_by(replace.id) |>
      summarize(across(-n.feat.perm, mean, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
      dplyr::select(!replace.id)
    ii1[mm, k] = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs") + m_time
    
    print(k)
    print(as.numeric(Sys.time() - s2, units = "mins"))
    k = k + 1
  }
  
  write.csv(ll1, "lime_time_1ka.csv", row.names = F)
  write.csv(ii1, "ici_time_1ka.csv", row.names = F)
  
  print(mm)
  print(as.numeric(Sys.time() - s1, units = "mins"))
}
```

# Sim 2000 LIME Monte Carlo

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
reps = 20

ltb2e = mat.or.vec(reps, 4)
itb2e = mat.or.vec(reps, 4)

for(mm in 12:reps){
  set.seed(mm)
  s1 = Sys.time()
  k = 1
  for(j in c(2, 10, 20, 30)){
    s2 = Sys.time()
    mt = ifelse(j == 1, 1, j/2)
    
    temp_df = mnist[sample(1:nrow(mnist), 2000),
                      c(sample(1:36, j), 37)]

    cl <- makeCluster(5)
    doParallel::registerDoParallel(cl)
    s = Sys.time()
    rt = caret::train(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], 
                      factor(temp_df$y), 
                      method = "rf", tuneGrid = expand.grid(mtry = mt))
    m_time = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs")
    stopCluster(cl)
    unregister_dopar()
  
    s = Sys.time()
    explanation <- lime(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], rt, bin_continuous = T,
                        n_bins = 10, use_density = T)
    elim = explain(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], explanation,
                   n_features = ncol(temp_df)-1, labels = "8")
    lime = elim %>% dplyr::select(case, feature, feature_weight) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = feature, values_from = c(feature_weight)) %>%
      dplyr::select(-case) %>% as.data.frame()
    ltb2e[mm, k] = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs") + m_time
    
    s = Sys.time()
    task = mlr::makeClassifTask(data = temp_df, target = "y")
    learner <- mlr::makeLearner("classif.randomForest")
    model <- mlr::train(learner, task)
    
    ici <- featureImportance::featureImportance(model, 
                             data = temp_df, target = "y", 
                             n.feat.perm = 25,
                             local = TRUE)
    iii = ici$importance |>
      pivot_wider(id_cols = c(replace.id, n.feat.perm), names_from = features,
                  values_from = mmce) |>
      group_by(replace.id) |>
      summarize(across(-n.feat.perm, mean, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
      dplyr::select(!replace.id)
    itb2e[mm, k] = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs") + m_time
    
    print(k)
    print(as.numeric(Sys.time() - s2, units = "mins"))
    k = k + 1
  }
  
  write.csv(ltb2e, "lime_time_master2k.csv", row.names = F)
  write.csv(itb2e, "ici_time_master2k.csv", row.names = F)
  
  print(mm)
  print(as.numeric(Sys.time() - s1, units = "mins"))
}
```

# Sim 4000 LIME Monte Carlo

```{r, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE, eval=FALSE, echo=FALSE}
reps = 20

lll1 = mat.or.vec(reps, 4)
iii1 = mat.or.vec(reps, 4)

for(mm in 1:reps){
  set.seed(mm)
  s1 = Sys.time()
  k = 1
  for(j in c(2, 10, 20, 30)){
    s2 = Sys.time()
    mt = ifelse(j == 1, 1, j/2)
    
    temp_df = mnist[sample(1:nrow(mnist), 4000),
                      c(sample(1:36, j), 37)]

    cl <- makeCluster(5)
    doParallel::registerDoParallel(cl)
    s = Sys.time()
    rt = caret::train(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], 
                      factor(temp_df$y), 
                      method = "rf", tuneGrid = expand.grid(mtry = mt))
    m_time = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs")
    stopCluster(cl)
    unregister_dopar()
  
    s = Sys.time()
    explanation <- lime(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], rt, bin_continuous = T,
                        n_bins = 10, use_density = T)
    elim = explain(temp_df[,-ncol(temp_df)], explanation,
                   n_features = ncol(temp_df)-1, labels = "8")
    lime = elim %>% dplyr::select(case, feature, feature_weight) %>%
      pivot_wider(names_from = feature, values_from = c(feature_weight)) %>%
      dplyr::select(-case) %>% as.data.frame()
    lll1[mm, k] = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs") + m_time
    
    s = Sys.time()
    task = mlr::makeClassifTask(data = temp_df, target = "y")
    learner <- mlr::makeLearner("classif.randomForest")
    model <- mlr::train(learner, task)
    
    ici <- featureImportance::featureImportance(model, 
                             data = temp_df, target = "y", 
                             n.feat.perm = 25,
                             local = TRUE)
    iii = ici$importance |>
      pivot_wider(id_cols = c(replace.id, n.feat.perm), names_from = features,
                  values_from = mmce) |>
      group_by(replace.id) |>
      summarize(across(-n.feat.perm, mean, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
      dplyr::select(!replace.id)
    iii1[mm, k] = as.numeric(Sys.time() - s, units = "secs") + m_time
    
    print(k)
    print(as.numeric(Sys.time() - s2, units = "mins"))
    k = k + 1
  }
  
  write.csv(lll1, "lime_time_4k.csv", row.names = F)
  write.csv(iii1, "ici_time_4k.csv", row.names = F)
  
  print(mm)
  print(as.numeric(Sys.time() - s1, units = "mins"))
}
```

# Merge and Plots

```{r, eval=FALSE, echo=TRUE}
stb = read.csv("shap_time3.csv")
ltb2b = read.csv("lime_time3.csv")
itb2b = read.csv("ici_time3.csv")
qtb = read.csv("clique_time3.csv")

l1 = read.csv("lime_time_1ka.csv")
i1 = read.csv("ici_time_1ka.csv")

l2 = read.csv("lime_time_master2k.csv")
i2 = read.csv("ici_time_master2k.csv")

ltb = cbind(ltb2b, l1, l2)
itb = cbind(itb2b, i1, i2)
colnames(ltb)[5:12] = colnames(stb)[5:12]
colnames(itb)[5:12] = colnames(stb)[5:12]

write.csv(ltb, "lime_time.csv", row.names = F)
write.csv(itb, "ici_time.csv", row.names = F)
```

```{r}
stb = read.csv("shap_time3.csv")
ltb = read.csv("lime_time.csv")
itb = read.csv("ici_time.csv")
qtb = read.csv("clique_time3.csv")
```

```{r}
cstb2 = colMeans(stb)
cltb2 = colMeans(ltb)
citb2 = colMeans(itb)
cqtb2 = colMeans(qtb)

mstb2 = apply(stb, 2, median)
mltb2 = apply(ltb, 2, median)
mitb2 = apply(itb, 2, median)
mqtb2 = apply(qtb, 2, median)

smax = apply(stb, 2, max)
smin = apply(stb, 2, min)
lmax = apply(ltb, 2, max)
lmin = apply(ltb, 2, min)
imax = apply(itb, 2, max)
imin = apply(itb, 2, min)
qmax = apply(qtb, 2, max)
qmin = apply(qtb, 2, min)

# dd2a = data.frame(n = rep(c(500, 1000, 2000, 4000), each = 4), 
#                  p = rep(c(2, 10, 20, 30), times = 4), 
#                  CLIQUE = cqtb2, 
#                  SHAP = cstb2, 
#                  LIME = c(cltb2, rep(NA, 4)),
#                  ICI = c(citb2, rep(NA, 4)),
#                  qmin, smin, 
#                  lmin = c(lmin, rep(NA, 4)), imin = c(imin, rep(NA, 4)),  
#                  qmax, smax, 
#                  lmax = c(lmax, rep(NA, 4)), imax = c(imax, rep(NA, 4))
#                  )

dd2a = data.frame(n = rep(c(500, 1000, 2000, 4000), each = 4), 
                 p = rep(c(2, 10, 20, 30), times = 4), 
                 CLIQUE = mqtb2, 
                 SHAP = mstb2, 
                 LIME = c(mltb2, rep(NA, 4)),
                 ICI = c(mitb2, rep(NA, 4)),
                 qmin, smin, 
                 lmin = c(lmin, rep(NA, 4)), imin = c(imin, rep(NA, 4)),  
                 qmax, smax, 
                 lmax = c(lmax, rep(NA, 4)), imax = c(imax, rep(NA, 4))
                 )

ddb2a = dd2a %>% pivot_longer(cols = 3:6, values_to = "time") %>% 
  dplyr::select(n, p, name, time)

ddb2min = dd2a %>% pivot_longer(cols = 7:10, values_to = "min") %>% 
  pull(min)

ddb2max = dd2a %>% pivot_longer(cols = 11:14, values_to = "max") %>% 
  pull(max)

ddb2a$min = ddb2min
ddb2a$max = ddb2max

colnames(ddb2a)[1] = "Obs"
colnames(ddb2a)[2] = "Vars"
```

```{r}
ddb2a$name = factor(ddb2a$name, 
                    levels = rev(c("ICI", "SHAP", "LIME", "CLIQUE")))

dimw = 5.5
dimh = 3.3

ggplot(ddb2a, aes(x = Vars, y = time, colour = name, group = name)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = min, ymax = max), width = 4, alpha = 0.8,
                linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line() + 
  facet_wrap(vars(Obs),  labeller = "label_both") + 
  xlab("Number of Variables (p)") +
  ylab("Time (secs)") + ggeasy::easy_remove_legend_title() 
  # + ggeasy::easy_legend_at("bottom") 

ggsave("time_vs_vars_fixed.pdf", dpi = 800, width = dimw, height = dimh)

ggplot(ddb2a, aes(x = Vars, y = time, colour = name, group = name)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = min, ymax = max), width = 4, alpha = 0.8,
                linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line() + 
  facet_wrap(vars(Obs), scales = "free", labeller = "label_both") + 
  xlab("Number of Variables (p)") +
  ylab("Time (secs)")  + ggeasy::easy_remove_legend_title()
  #+ ggeasy::easy_legend_at("bottom")

ggsave("time_vs_vars.pdf", dpi = 800, width = dimw, height = dimh)

ggplot(ddb2a, aes(x = Obs, y = time, colour = name, group = name)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = min, ymax = max), alpha = 0.8,
                width = 0.3, linetype = "dashed") +
  geom_line() + 
  facet_wrap(vars(Vars), scales = "fixed", labeller = "label_both") +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(450, 4500),
    trans = "log2",
    breaks = unique(ddb2a$Obs),           # or specify your desired ticks
    labels = unique(ddb2a$Obs)            # keeps labels unchanged
  ) + 
  xlab("Number of Observations (n)") +
  ylab("Time (secs)") +
  ggeasy::easy_remove_legend_title()
  #+ ggeasy::easy_legend_at("bottom")

ggsave("time_vs_obs.pdf", dpi = 800, width = dimw, height = dimh)
```
